ats_utilities.logging.engine module¶

Module

engine.py

Info

Defines class ATSLoggerManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS logging mechanism.

class ats_utilities.logging.engine.ATSLoggerManager(component_bundle: LoggingComponentBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: ILoggerManager

Defines class ATSLoggerManager with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the ATS logging mechanism. ATS logger mechanism.

It defines:

attributes:
ATS_CRITICAL - Critical log level.
ATS_DEBUG - Debug log level.
ATS_ERROR - Error log level.
ATS_INFO - Info log level.
ATS_WARNING - Warning log level.
__logger - Prepared logger instance or default logger.
__checker - Factoriezed parameters checker (default Checker).
__reporter - Factoriezed reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
__verbose - Factoriezed Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
methods:
__init__ - Initials ATSLoggerManager constructor.
get_logger - Gets logger instance.
ok - Checks if logger manager component is ok.
write_log - Writes message to log output.
ATS_CRITICAL = 50¶
ATS_DEBUG = 10¶
ATS_ERROR = 40¶
ATS_INFO = 20¶
ATS_WARNING = 30¶
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
get_logger() → ILogger[source]¶

Gets logger instance.

Returns:

Logger instance.

Return type:

<ILogger>

Exceptions:

None

ok() → bool[source]¶

Checks if logger component is ok.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

write_log(message: str | None, ctrl: int) → bool[source]¶

Writes message to log output.

Parameters:

  • message (<Optional[str]>) – Log message in string format for log output | None.

  • ctrl (<int>) – Control flag (debug, warning, critical, errors, info).

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail).

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.
